title: Heartukulla Pachkuthiye Lyrics Gulebagavali

Heartukulla Pachkuthiye Lyrics From Gulebagavali Movie. Song is Composed by Vivek Mervin and sung by Nakash Aziz, Sanjana Diwakar
Here is Heartukulla Pachkuthiye Lyrics  enakku ummela thaan
unakku emmela thaan
yedho onne onnu irukku irukku

lightaa budhi vara

ok solluriyaa enakku enakku

heartukulla pachchakuthiye

pesaama nee paththa vachiye
kaattu konjam
pachcha pachcha pachcha
kodiye. (2)

en pachcha pachcha
pachcha kodiye

will you be my
honey bunny
people think I am
really funny.
tharuven enna ini
vaamaa honey bunny. (2)

usura vitten
bestu frienda ellaam
kalati vitten

ayyo paavamnu
ok panren
illa illa illa
think panni solren.

enna ponnammaa
hotu watera thaan
heartukulla ooththitiye

aavaa chellammaa
feelings ennammaa
lovea solradhukku
logic ellaam paakkuriyemaa

enakku ummela thaan
unakku emmela thaan
yedho onne onnu irukku irukku

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Heartukulla Pachkuthiye conveys a playful and joyful expression of love, emphasizing the fun and light-hearted aspects of romance.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Gulebagavali, this song is featured during a lively sequence that showcases the characters celebrating love and happiness.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Nakash Aziz and Sanjana Divaker, with music composed by Vivek – Mervin.

When was the song released?

Heartukulla Pachkuthiye was released on January 21, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Heartukulla Pachkuthiye, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song captures the essence of youthful love, filled with playful banter and excitement. As the characters dance and revel in their feelings, the upbeat tempo and vibrant vocals evoke a sense of happiness and togetherness. This track is perfect for any festive occasion, making it a delightful addition to the soundtrack of Gulebagavali.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Heartukulla Pachkuthiye from Gulebagavali is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Nakash Aziz and Sanjana Divaker. With the energetic beats crafted by the talented duo Vivek – Mervin, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious vibe that makes this track a must-listen for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: Heartukulla Pachkuthiye Lyrics From Gulebagavali Movie. Song is Composed by Vivek Mervin and sung by Nakash Aziz, Sanjana Diwakar Here is Heartukulla Pachkuthiye Lyrics
Is your mind loose or light? Can you tell me?
Don't let my green feelings go away, my green girl, without talking, show me a little green, green, green.
My green girl, my green, green, green.
Will you be my honey bunny? People think I am really funny. I will give you whatever you want, honey bunny.
In my first look, I lost my breath, best friend, I lost everything.
Oh no, I feel bad, I am not doing anything, I am just thinking and saying.
Oh my dear, what is this? Hot water is what is flowing in my heart.
Oh my dear, feelings are not just love, do we really need to look for logic?
